title: Exploring the Complete LLM Internals Playground
concept: The four-stage LLM processing pipeline (tokenize → embed → attend → sample)
primary_question: What exactly am I going to build and why should I care?
what_gets_built: See the full LLM Internals Playground vision, understand the four-stage pipeline, and implement a text preparation function that validates and cleans input for the tokenizer.
concepts_introduced: The four-stage LLM processing pipeline (tokenize → embed → attend → sample)
